details.restore_scope: Restore the timestamp-matched API, Client, Admin and Mongo configuration artifacts, recreate only LibreChat-API and LibreChat-Admin-Panel, then verify the main app, usage dashboard, Admin Panel and Office authentication boundary.

details.description: LibreChat main before the user balance and administrator credit feature

change_summary.expected_result: Administrators can adjust a user's USD credit and users can see current balance plus administrator credit records while native LibreChat transactions continue to charge usage.
functions: Administrator credit history with post-adjustment balance
limitations: No payment gateway or user self-service recharge
Only the latest 200 administrator adjustments are retained per user
Admin dependency build is delegated to the repository's fixed-version Admin CI
change_summary.reason: Customers need a visible account balance and administrators need an auditable NewAPI-style credit operation without replacing LibreChat's native balance and transaction accounting.
change_summary.risk: Persistent balance writes and three affected runtime surfaces require balance backup, isolation checks, and targeted API, Client, and Admin acceptance before production.

details.command: Restore the timestamp-matched API, Client, Admin and Mongo configuration artifacts from /opt/librechat/backups/user-balance-credits-20260723011842, recreate only LibreChat-API and LibreChat-Admin-Panel, then repeat targeted acceptance.

unresolved_issues: No real administrator credit adjustment was executed during acceptance, so production balances and credit history were not modified.
Admin Panel container recreation invalidated the prior browser session; a signed-in administrator should perform the first real credit adjustment when operationally required.
validation_plan: Run focused Admin balance handler tests for add, replay, deduction, and overdraft rejection
Run authenticated usage dashboard aggregation and client marker tests
Run Admin locale, typecheck, unit, and build checks with the locked toolchain
Verify resolved production balance.enabled before allowing adjustments
Back up balances and perform two-user isolation acceptance before production deployment
